description_long: This is a large, symmetrical school building with a prominent central entrance flanked by two extended wings. The facade features multiple arched windows and a series of columns supporting a covered walkway along the front. The roof is pitched and appears to be covered with dark shingles, while the walls are a mix of light and reddish-brown tones, likely brick and concrete. The central entrance is slightly recessed and elevated, accessible by a short staircase. The structure is elevated on a series of pillars, creating a sheltered area beneath the main floor. The overall design is functional and institutional, suitable for accommodating many students and staff.
description: A large, symmetrical school building with arched windows, a central entrance, and extended wings, featuring brick and concrete construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, arched windows, and covered walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building and the pitched roof.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with symmetrical wings and visible windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the building's length and roof structure.
